basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central salt and marine chemical research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central salt and marine chemical research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) Recruitment 2026: Central salt and marine chemical research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant II posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per CSIR rules.

qualification.details: Project Assistant II (PA-II): B.Sc. (Chemistry) with experience in marine chemicals analysis, Pilot plant and scale up related activities.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant II (PA-II): Rs. 20,000/- + HRA (applicable as per CSIR rules)

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications based on criteria Interview (online or in-person)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Assistant II?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Chemistry. Additionally, experience in marine chemicals analysis, pilot plant, and scale-up activities is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant II position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per the rules of CSIR.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection process be conducted?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial scrutiny of applications based on the defined criteria, followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or in-person.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), as per CSIR rules.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send a scanned copy of your completed application form along with all required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach scanned copies of your passport size photograph, birth certificate, caste certificate (if applicable), educational qualification certificates, experience certificates, and any publications in PDF format.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CSMCRI is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with the pincode 364002.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, meaning the position is for a specific project duration at the Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute.
